title: pelargonium ovale
intro: Pelargonium ovale, also known as the oval-leaved geranium, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the geranium family. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine, and they are known for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium ovale are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and ease digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. The leaves can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and they are also used in various herbal preparations, including salves and ointments, to take advantage of their health benefits.
